purpose: Planned third-dataset retrospective robustness evaluation under a harmonized clinical-event framework.
current_locked_evidence_before_hirid: MIMIC-IV v3.1 strict clinical-event retrospective validation
eICU v2.0 harmonized clinical-event labeling pass
safe_current_wording: Early Risk Alert AI has retrospective multi-dataset evidence across MIMIC-IV and eICU, with HiRID access pending for a planned third-dataset robustness evaluation.
claim_boundary: Do not claim three-dataset validation until HiRID access, extraction, scoring, harmonized labeling, and aggregate review are complete.
Do not claim fully clinically validated without prospective pilot evidence or independent clinical/statistical review.
dua_safety: Raw files, row-level outputs, patient identifiers, timestamps, and enriched restricted-data outputs remain local-only.
